title: What Scripture actually says about humility (it's not what you think)
caption:
You've been sold a version of humility that looks like having no spine.

That's not what God asked for. The humble man isn't the quiet one in the corner who steps back whenever someone pushes. He's the man who knows exactly who he is and who his strength belongs to — and that security is what lets him serve, absorb cost, and stay correctable without it threatening him.

Jesus didn't shrink. He submitted. That's a completely different thing.

Humility is strength under submission. And it's the most dangerous posture in a room.

Save this and send it to the man who's confused humble with weak.

#faith #christianmen #godlymen #manofgod #humility #scripture #christianity #discipleship
